project.name: EuroOpenCharts
project.navigation_warning: Experimental scientific prototype. Not for navigation.

local_basemap_gshhs.name: GSHHS coastlines distributed with Basemap data package

local_basemap_etopo1.name: ETOPO1 shaded relief image distributed with Basemap data package
local_basemap_etopo1.role: relief and bathymetric background rendering, not numeric bathymetry

official_mpa_geojson.name: Official or openly licensed Marine Protected Areas input
official_mpa_geojson.role: MPA geometry, zones, permissions and rules
official_mpa_geojson.license: MUST be provided with the actual source dataset
official_mpa_geojson.notes: Set layers.marine_protected_areas.path and rules_path to authoritative local files. The workflow never invents MPA geometries or rules.
